title: Borrow & Die — Card Schema v2
description: Schema definitions for all card types in Borrow & Die.

placement.description: Position in the industry supply chain. Determines vertical integration eligibility.

tier.description: Asset tier. Tier 1 = starter/labor phase accessible. Tier 2 = mid game. Tier 3 = high growth, high stress, gated by CEO level.

d6OutcomeRange.description: A single outcome band on a d6 roll.

range.description: [min, max] inclusive. All outcomes across the full rule must cover 1–6 exactly once.

delta.description: Change to Asset Value when this range is rolled. Negative = value loss. Zero = no change.

baseValueUpdateRule.description: Defines how this asset's value changes each year via a d6 roll. Outcomes must fully cover 1–6.

outcomes.description: All outcome bands. Must collectively and exclusively cover 1–6.

industryMechanic.description: Optional. Describes any special industry mechanic that modifies how this rule is applied (e.g. Manufacturing GMI halving, Media buzz die, Energy GMI amplification).

loanRepaymentRule.description: Per-10-loan-units repayment pressure rolled during settlement each year.

trigger.description: If true: player must pay $1 cash and remove 1 loan token.

relief.description: If true: player may remove 1 loan token for free (no cash cost). Used for roll-of-6 relief rule.

outcomes.description: Must fully cover 1–6. Roll of 6 should always have relief: true per core rules.

paymentOnTrigger.description: Cash cost when trigger fires. Always 1 per core rules.

verticalIntegrationRule.description: Bonus activated when player also owns another asset in this industry at the required placement.

requiresIndustry.description: Must match this card's own industry.

requiresPlacement.description: The placement the player must also own to activate this bonus.

effectType.description: Category of effect for card generator and rules clarity.

effectMagnitude.description: Numeric magnitude of the effect where applicable (e.g. +2 loan capacity, -1 stress). Omit for SPECIAL effects.

effectDescription.description: Human-readable rules text printed on the card. Must be unambiguous and reference only placements and industry.

stressReduction.description: If this integration bonus reduces player stress, the amount. 0 if no stress effect.

crossIndustrySynergy.description: Optional bonus activated when player owns an asset in a different industry at the specified placement. Represents cross-industry combos.

assetCard.description: A company or asset that players can own. The core game object.

companyName.description: Thematic name of the company. Should reflect industry and tier.

baseValue.description: Fixed starting value. Also the IPO price — minimum auction bid. Never changes after card is printed.

stress.description: Stress added to player when this asset is acquired. Removed when sold. Tier 1: 0–1. Tier 2: 1–2. Tier 3: 2–3.

income.description: Income generated by this asset each year. Added to player's taxable income pool before loan offset. Tier 3 high-growth assets should be 0.

baseLoanCapacity.description: Starting loan capacity at acquisition regardless of asset value. Red peg starting position.

loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue.description: Additional loan capacity granted each time asset value crosses a +10 boundary. Approximates LTV ratio. E.g. 5 = ~50% LTV, 3 = ~30% LTV.

verticalIntegrationRules.description: One entry per adjacent placement this card can pair with for integration bonuses. Max 2 entries (one per adjacent tier).

crossIndustrySynergies.description: Optional cross-industry combo bonuses. Max 1 per card to avoid complexity.

flavourText.description: Short thematic quote or description printed at the bottom of the card.

ceoCard.description: The player's active leadership identity. Determines starting income, stress, asset tier access, and special abilities.

ceoName.description: Name or title of the CEO archetype.

ceoTier.description: 0 = starter (everyone begins here). 1 = first upgrade (requires owning 1 Tier 1 asset). 2 = advanced (requires owning 1 Tier 2 asset).

upgradeRequirement.description: What the player must own to equip this CEO. Omit for Tier 0 starter.

minOwnedAssetTier.description: Player must own at least one asset of this tier to unlock this CEO.

annualIncome.description: Base cash income per year from the CEO card alone, before asset income.

startingStress.description: Stress assigned to player when this CEO is equipped or re-equipped after bankruptcy.

maxAssetTier.description: Highest asset tier this CEO permits the player to bid on. Tier 0 and 1 CEOs cap at 2. Tier 2 CEOs unlock Tier 3.

deathRollThreshold.description: Stress value at which death rolls begin. Default 6. The Bureaucrat raises this to 8.

laborPhaseRule.description: Special rules that apply during the labor phase (no assets owned).

bonusIncomeRoll.description: Optional d6 bonus income roll during labor phase.

triggerRange.description: [min, max] — roll within this range earns bonus cash.

bonusAmount.description: Cash earned when bonus roll triggers.

heldCardSaleValue.description: Cash received when selling a held personal event card during labor phase. Default 1.

abilities.description: Special rules this CEO grants. Each ability is a distinct effect.

abilityType.description: PASSIVE = always active. ONCE_PER_YEAR / ONCE_PER_GAME = player-activated. TRIGGERED = fires on a specific condition. RISK = a downside that activates on a condition.

frequency.description: How often this ability can fire.

description.description: Rules text printed on the card. Unambiguous, complete, self-contained.

stressEffect.description: Stress delta caused by this ability when it fires. Negative = relief. Positive = penalty.

flavourText.description: Short character quote printed at the bottom of the card.

globalEventCard.description: Drawn publicly at the start of each year. Affects all players and the GMI.

eventCategory.description: Category for thematic and mechanical grouping.

gmiDelta.description: Change to GMI this year. Positive = market growth. Negative = contraction. Range: -5 to +5.

years.description: How many years this event persists. 1 = single year. 2–4 = multi-year (depression mechanic).

durationRoll.description: Optional: roll a die to determine how many years the event lasts.

resultMapping.description: Human-readable mapping of roll to years. E.g. '1–2: 1 year, 3–4: 2 years, 5–6: 3 years'.

effects.description: Mechanical effects applied to all players this year.

targetIndustry.description: If effectType is INDUSTRY_SPECIFIC, which industry is targeted.

magnitude.description: Numeric magnitude of the effect where applicable.

description.description: Rules text printed on card. Self-contained and unambiguous.

flavourText.description: Thematic quote or headline flavour text.

personalEventCard.description: Drawn once per player per year. Some play immediately; some are held for later use or sold.

playTiming.description: IMMEDIATE = resolves the moment it is drawn, cannot be held. HOLD = player may keep this card and play it later or sell it for $1.

immediateEffect.description: Effect that fires when this card is played (for IMMEDIATE) or activated (for HOLD).

magnitude.description: Numeric magnitude where applicable. Positive or negative.

description.description: Full rules text of the effect. Self-contained.

targetScope.description: Who or what is affected by this card.

deathRollEffect.description: If present, this card interacts with the death roll mechanic when played.

effectType.description: NEGATE_DEATH_ROLL: cancel a death roll entirely. REROLL_DEATH: roll again and take the better result. REDUCE_DEATH_THRESHOLD: lower stress by amount before this turn's death roll.

magnitude.description: For REDUCE_DEATH_THRESHOLD: how much stress is reduced before the roll.

saleValue.description: Cash received if player sells this held card instead of playing it. Default 1 per core rules.

flavourText.description: Thematic quote — ideally darkly funny for death-adjacent cards.
